description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency in modern JavaScript by testing their knowledge of ECMAScript features spanning from ES2015 to ES2022. Presented with a playful and slightly cheeky tone, it uses a multiple-choice format to challenge intermediate to advanced developers who want to validate their up-to-date language skills.
Topics: JavaScript, ECMAScript (ES2015-ES2022), Modern Web Development, Language Syntax and Features
Audience: Intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers and frontend engineers
